anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Whirlpool bath position extracted from architect Rev-C plan dated 2026-05-15; specified as 1700x700 acrylic whirlpool with integral jets per client schedule. Pump location NOT shown on architectural drawing.
Shower-over-whirlpool-bath head at 2100mm AFF from architect Rev-C plumbing schedule; thermostatic mixer at midpoint of bath length.

zones._derivation_note: Zone 0 = interior volume of whirlpool bath basin per §701 zone-table convention. Whirlpool jets do not change the Zone 0 geometry — SELV-only rule still applies.
Zone 1 is the vertical projection above the whirlpool to 2250mm AFF. IPx5 raised from baseline IPx4 because whirlpool jets count as water jets per BS 7671:2018 §701.512.2. Overlaps shower_1 Zone 1.
Zone 1 from shower_1 head at 2100mm AFF; ceiling capped by shower head per §701 zone-table. IPx5 inherited because shower zone coincides with whirlpool zone and the stricter minimum prevails.
Zone 2 = 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1 per §701 zone-table. Sockets prohibited within 3m of Zone 1 per §701.512.3. Polygon shown unclipped; runtime clips to room polygon.
Zone 2 from shower_1: 600mm horizontal extension; vertical ceiling 2100mm. Coincides with bath_1 zone_2.

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: 30 mA RCD on all bathroom LV circuits per §701.411.3.3. Heater exemption is sauna-specific (§703.411.3.3) and does not apply to whirlpool pump — pump must be RCD-protected like all other bathroom circuits.

Whirlpool pump circuit constraint per §701 + §701.512.2 IPx5 water-jets rule. Pump position defaulted to bath edge (zone_bath_1_z1) because input did not specify whirlpool_pump_position — engineer-of-record to confirm. Local isolation required to allow safe maintenance access without isolating the whole bathroom.
electrical_constraints._whirlpool_general_citation: BS 7671:2018 §701 (no sub-clause for whirlpools in verified file) — IPx5 derived from §701.512.2 water-jets clause

assumptions: Whirlpool pump position defaulted to bath edge (zone_bath_1_z1) because whirlpool_pump_position not supplied — IPx5 per BS 7671:2018 §701.512.2.
Bath rim height defaulted to 550mm AFF (typical UK acrylic bath).
Shower head at 2100mm AFF treated as Zone 1 ceiling per §701 zone-table convention.
_engineering_judgments: REVIEWER D-3: bath_kind=whirlpool with no whirlpool_pump_position supplied in input. Skill placed pump at bath edge (zone_bath_1_z1) with IPx5 per BS 7671:2018 §701.512.2 water-jets clause. Engineer-of-record must confirm actual pump location against installer drawing and verify access for maintenance isolation. No specific whirlpool sub-clause exists in the verified BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 file — IPx5 derivation routed through §701.512.2 (water jets).

invariants.evidence: 2 anchors (bath_1 + shower_1) produce 5 zones; overlapping pairs catalogued. No silent merges.
existing_fixtures_audit[] has 3 compliant entries; non_compliance_flags[] empty. One-to-one correspondence trivially holds.
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone present. §710 medical IT system requirement N/A.
room_type=bathroom; rcd_blanket_by_room constraint present with rcd_rating_ma=30 and sauna_heater_excluded=false per §701.411.3.3. Whirlpool pump explicitly included in applies_to_circuit_types[].
Not a swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding N/A.

bath_kind=whirlpool triggers whirlpool_pump_circuit constraint: pump_position_zone=zone_bath_1_z1, requires_local_isolation=true, ip_rating_min=IPx5 per BS 7671:2018 §701 + §701.512.2. Honest-disclosure cross-reference recorded in _whirlpool_general_citation.

3 fixtures audited: lum_1 (IPx4 ceiling, outside zones), lum_2 (IPx4 ceiling above Zone 1), shaver_1 (BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver socket outside Zone 2 y-range). All 4 sub-rules (type/IP/voltage/switch-distance) PASS.
Both anchors use _extraction_source=architectural_drawing_extraction. Provenance notes 161 and 145 chars — both ≥40.
compliant=true; violation_count_critical=0; non_compliance_flags=[]; declared overlaps are not silent. Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: Standalone whirlpool variant — 2700×2100mm bathroom with whirlpool bath + shower-over-bath. Whirlpool bath_kind triggers INV-06 + D-3 reviewer flag. 5 zones derived (Zone 1 IPx5 raised per §701.512.2 water-jets clause); 2 constraints (rcd_blanket §701.411.3.3 + whirlpool_pump_circuit §701 + §701.512.2). 3 fixtures all compliant. All 10 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701 governs bathroom zoning. §701.411.3.3 mandates 30 mA RCD blanket. §701.512.2 raises Zone 1 IP minimum to IPx5 wherever water jets are used — whirlpool jets satisfy this trigger. §701.414.4.5 fixes Zone 0 at 12 V SELV. §701.512.3 keeps generic 230 V sockets ≥3 m from Zone 1. No §701 sub-clause for whirlpool specifically — routing through §701.512.2 is the honest disclosure.

sections.title: Zone derivation logic
sections.summary: Identical plan polygon to the standard-bath case (5 zones); the whirlpool differs only in zone IPx5 minimum on Zone 1 (raised from baseline IPx4) per §701.512.2 water-jets clause. Whirlpool pump constraint adds a 2nd electrical_constraint entry binding to zone_bath_1_z1 with requires_local_isolation=true.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Reviewer D-3 flag raised: whirlpool_pump_position not supplied — skill defaulted pump to bath edge. _whirlpool_general_citation field explicitly records that no §701 sub-clause for whirlpools exists in the verified file; IPx5 derivation routed through §701.512.2 (water jets). Engineer-of-record must verify actual pump position against installer drawing.

sections.title: Failure modes considered
sections.summary: If whirlpool_pump_position were supplied outside zone_bath_1_z1, the constraint pump_position_zone would re-bind. If pump IP were under-specified at IPx4 instead of IPx5, INV-06 would FAIL (sub-rule: ip_rating_min violation). Local isolation requirement is hard-coded to true to enable safe motor service without isolating the whole bathroom RCD.
